availability_assumptions.available_ts_rule: feature.available_ts = current OHLCV input row available_ts
availability_assumptions.dense_grid_rule: no_trade rows are gaps for trade-derived calculations
availability_assumptions.lookback_rule: rolling and prior-boundary windows include only rows with available_ts <= output.available_ts
availability_assumptions.session_context: session labels are metadata roles and remain point-in-time under the existing guard

duplicate_or_equivalent_exposure_notes.summary: P13 locked FeaturePack and LabelPack inventory checked; no locked pack member resolves this P15 gap item.

formula_sketch.trigger_rule: sweep and breakout flags compare the current completed OHLCV row to prior rows available before or at the output timestamp
formula_sketch.window_rule: trendiness, ATR, prior boundaries, compression, sweep, and failed-breakout state use causal rolling or point-in-time windows only
